name: ember-claude-skills
description: EmberJS skills, agents, and commands for Claude Code, covering every Ember era from 2.x through Octane and Polaris (5.x+). Modern authoring (Octane fundamentals, components, routing, services, Ember Data, testing, ecosystem addons, TypeScript/Glint, Polaris template tag) plus version-specific skills and migrator agents that drive 2 → 3 → 4 → 5 upgrades.
